title: Validate error handling for registration with an existing email
description: Test that the system prevents a new user from registering with an email address that is already in use and provides a clear error message.
preconditions: An account with the email 'existing@example.com' already exists

steps.description: 3. Enter a valid password and confirm it

expected_result: The registration fails. An error message 'Email already exists' is displayed, and the API response contains the 'EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS' error code.
